## ERT1.1. Horizontal en route flight efficiency of the actual trajectory (KEA) (KPI#1) {#ert1.1.-horizontal-en-route-flight-efficiency-of-the-actual-trajectory-kea-kpi1 .Heading-2-ER}

The value of KEA for Slovenia has improved from 1.77% to 1.58% between 2025 and 2024. Similarly, the value of the corrected KEA has improved from 1.66% to 1.5%.

These values rank Slovenia as 3^rd^ in terms of KEA and 6^th^ in terms of corrected KEA.

Slovenia is the one least contributing (i.e., the "best") to the additional distance in the SES area, with a value of 0.35%.
